narrative: USD/JPY holds 159.24 — Fed-BoJ 400bp differential anchors carry while BoJ decision (02:30 UTC Apr 28) introduces binary risk; JPY COT short -80.6k near historic extreme raises squeeze risk. Gold $4,742 slips on Iran talks stall; VIX 18.71 sub-threshold. DXY 98.43 flat as SPX +0.80% sustains risk-on posture. China AI-chip import surge compresses CNY fix to 6.8282. BOJ Outlook Report and press conference are the session's defining catalysts.
